items.headline: The Scout S4E28: Young and Dangerous Spurs
items.description: The Spurs are looking like one of the most complete teams in the playoffs .After closing out the Blazers, San Antonio showed theyre more than just Wemby  with depth, composure, and a roster built to win now.So what makes them so dangerous? Lets break it down on The Scout.

items.headline: Game Recap: Timberwolves 110, Nuggets 98
items.description: The Timberwolves defeated the Nuggets, 110-98, to win the series, 4-2, and advance to the Western Conference Semifinals.

items.headline: Jaden McDaniels' playoff career-high 32 points power Timberwolves
items.description: Jaden McDaniels scores a playoff career-high 32 points to help close the Nuggets out in Game 6 for Minnesota.
